title: Traefik Router
description: Represents an HTTP, TCP, or UDP router in a running Traefik instance, including its routing rule, entry points, service assignment, and middleware chain.

name.description: The name of the router in name@provider format.

entryPoints.description: Entry points this router is bound to.

rule.description: The routing rule expression used to match incoming requests (e.g., Host, Path, Headers matchers for HTTP; HostSNI for TCP).

ruleSyntax.description: The syntax version of the rule expression.

priority.description: The priority of the router when multiple routers match the same request. Higher values take precedence.

service.description: The name of the service this router routes traffic to.

middlewares.description: Ordered list of middleware names applied to requests handled by this router.

status.description: The current operational status of the router.

provider.description: The configuration provider that created this router (e.g., docker, kubernetes, file).

tls.description: TLS configuration for this router, if TLS termination is enabled.

using.description: Entry points currently being used by this router.

TLSConfig.description: TLS configuration for a router, including certificate resolver and domain settings.

passthrough.description: Whether TLS connections are passed through to the backend without termination (TCP only).

options.description: Name of the TLS options configuration to use.

certResolver.description: Name of the certificate resolver to use for automatic TLS certificate provisioning.

Domain.description: Domain configuration for TLS certificate generation.

main.description: The main domain name for the certificate.

sans.description: Subject Alternative Names for the certificate.
